name: prepend-non-string
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :PrependSubjectNotString :message "prepend expects String at position 1, got Number" :operand "prepend" :position 1 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "prepend" :args [{ :qlang/kind :StringLit :value "x" :text "\"x\"" :location { :start { :offset 13 :line 1 :column 14 } :end { :offset 16 :line 1 :column 17 } } }] :effectful false :text "prepend(\"x\")" :location { :start { :offset 5 :line 1 :column 6 } :end { :offset 17 :line 1 :column 18 } } } :input 42 } :trail [] }

name: append-non-string
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :AppendSubjectNotString :message "append expects String at position 1, got Number" :operand "append" :position 1 :expectedType "String" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "append" :args [{ :qlang/kind :StringLit :value "x" :text "\"x\"" :location { :start { :offset 12 :line 1 :column 13 } :end { :offset 15 :line 1 :column 16 } } }] :effectful false :text "append(\"x\")" :location { :start { :offset 5 :line 1 :column 6 } :end { :offset 16 :line 1 :column 17 } } } :input 42 } :trail [] }

name: table-non-vec
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :TableSubjectNotVec :message "table requires Vec subject, got Number" :operand "table" :position "subject" :expectedType "Vec" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "table" :args null :effectful false :text "table" :location { :start { :offset 5 :line 1 :column 6 } :end { :offset 10 :line 1 :column 11 } } } :input 42 } :trail [] }

name: table-mixed
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :TableRowNotMap :message "table: element 0 expects Map, got Number" :operand "table" :index 0 :expectedType "Map" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "table" :args null :effectful false :text "table" :location { :start { :offset 15 :line 1 :column 16 } :end { :offset 20 :line 1 :column 21 } } } :input [42 "hello"] } :trail [] }
